mentions.note: Cramer's breakout early stock pick; attractive breakfast offerings, good service, growth plan to expand Midwest; stock split and compounded.
Cash flow decline and non-growing dividends turned seemingly good dividend stock into non-dividend stock; red flag example for Sandy.
Goldman Sachs client example; real estate tycoon held for long-term; stock doubled; teaches lesson not to turn investment into trade.
Momentum stock; price target requires multi-year earnings projections; GLP-1 sales runway extends to end of decade.
Historical example from childhood; Cramer's father sold 3M bookshelf games. Modern day plagued by major litigation issues.
One of the great momentum stocks of the last couple of years; price target setting requires years-ahead earnings outlook.
High-school friend tipped hiring surge; no debt, solid fundamentals. Later acquired by Precision Castparts; PCP eventually sold to Berkshire Hathaway in 2016.
Oil company with gusher in Indonesia; identified as M&A candidate; Kerr McGee acquisition nearly doubled Cramer's money.
